flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Gordon State College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (65.2% → 51.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gordon State College rose 224% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 8.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gordon State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gordon State College rose 52% between 2006 and 2009 (10.8% → 16.5%).
